note: Catalog only. Skills are NOT stored here; each is fetched from its own source repository at install time. 'access: licensed' means the repo is private and a BestAI token with access is required.

skills.name: wide-research
skills.title: Web Research (Wide Research)
skills.description: Long, multi-hour, breadth-first research on a single topic. Fans out many parallel sub-agents wave after wave, folds findings to disk, finds the gaps, and finishes with a verified, cited report plus a living document.
